overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai character walking through coastal rice terraces during a vibrant sunset. The character travels from an open coastal viewpoint with a wooden water wheel toward inland farmland as the lighting transitions from golden hour to dusk.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal rice terraces with ocean view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path between tall grass and rice paddies toward the ocean sunset

entered.detail: thatched roof wooden farmhouse situated on the coastline
terraced rice fields with water reflections and harvested stalks
calm sea stretching to the horizon with sun reflecting off the surface
rocky white cliff formations along the shoreline
narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks along a coastal dirt path during golden hour, with terraced rice paddies to the right and the ocean ahead. The traditional farmhouse sits prominently on the coastline while the sun casts long shadows across the landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal farm with wooden water wheel

events.description: character approaches the large wooden water wheel structure
character stops at the water wheel to observe the sunset over the ocean

agents.ego_description: approaching the water wheel along the coastal path and pausing to take in the scenic view

entered.detail: large wooden water wheel for irrigation standing beside the rice paddies

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the path to a large wooden water wheel used for irrigating the rice paddies. The coastal cliffs pass out of view as the farmhouse recedes into the distance, with the sun setting brilliantly over the ocean ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded inland farm trail with stone walls

events.description: lighting shifts to darker dusk tones as character moves away from the open coast
character turns 180 degrees away from the coast and walks inland

agents.ego_description: turning away from the ocean view and walking inland along a shaded dirt path bordered by trees

entered.detail: low stone walls lining the farm fields
dense cluster of trees providing shade over the path

segments.scene_description: After pausing at the water wheel, the character turns inland as the lighting shifts to a darker dusk. The open coastal view gives way to a shaded trail lined with stone walls and trees, with the farmhouse now visible to the left before disappearing from view.

events.description: scene transitions to full dusk with deep blue sky and fading ambient light

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding dirt path through farmland and trees in the fading evening light

entered.detail: stacked hay bales in the farm fields
tree-covered hills rising in the inland distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the inland farmland as dusk settles and the sky turns deep blue. The path winds through dense vegetation and past haystacks, with forested hills visible in the distance, completely away from the coastal area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sun-drenched coastal vista into the deepening shadows of inland farmland. It begins with a samurai walking along a dirt path during golden hour, passing terraced rice paddies and a traditional farmhouse set against the ocean. As the character continues forward, the coastal cliffs recede and the farmhouse fades into the distance, leading the camera toward a large wooden water wheel under a brilliant sunset. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the coast, moving onto a shaded trail lined with stone walls while the lighting transitions from gold to a darker dusk. Finally, the path winds deeper into the interior through dense vegetation and haystacks, ending among forested hills under a deep blue twilight sky.
